ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., individual, population) */,
  "individual_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the individual from whom the sample was collected */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., blood, saliva) */,
  "preservation_method" TEXT /* Method used to preserve the sample */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relatedness" (
  "relatedness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relatedness record */,
  "sample_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first sample in the comparison */,
  "sample_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second sample in the comparison */,
  "relatedness" REAL /* Calculated relatedness score */,
  "ibs0" INTEGER /* Identity-by-state score for 0 alleles */,
  "ibs2" INTEGER /* Identity-by-state score for 2 alleles */,
  "hom_concordance" REAL /* Homologous concordance score */,
  "hets_a" INTEGER /* Number of heterozygous alleles in sample A */,
  "hets_b" INTEGER /* Number of heterozygous alleles in sample B */,
  "shared_hets" INTEGER /* Number of shared heterozygous alleles */,
  "hom_alts_a" INTEGER /* Number of homozygous alleles in sample A */,
  "hom_alts_b" INTEGER /* Number of homozygous alleles in sample B */,
  "shared_hom_alts" INTEGER /* Number of shared homozygous alleles */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Total number of alleles compared */,
  "x_ibs0" INTEGER /* X value for identity-by-state 0 */,
  "x_ibs2" INTEGER /* X value for identity-by-state 2 */,
  "expected_relatedness" REAL /* Expected relatedness based on population metrics */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the relatedness score */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the relatedness score */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the relatedness */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the relatedness analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relatedness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relatedness_sample_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_b_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relatedness_sample_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_a_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "relatedness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relatedness record being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_logs_relatedness_id FOREIGN KEY ("relatedness_id") REFERENCES relatedness ("relatedness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allele_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the frequency record */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Name of the population studied */,
  "allele" TEXT /* Identifier of the allele */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Observed frequency of the allele */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the study in which the allele frequency was determined */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was conducted */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the allele frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allele_frequencies_population FOREIGN KEY ("population") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic marker */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of the marker (e.g., SNP, STR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marker */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the marker is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position on the chromosome */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele for the marker */,
  "alternative_allele" TEXT /* Alternative allele for the marker */,
  "function" TEXT /* Functional significance of the marker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population characteristics */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the population */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Estimated size of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being analyzed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the sample was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
